metadata.title: Helia — Repurpose content for social
metadata.description: Turn long-form content into Twitter threads, Instagram carousels, hooks, and CTAs.

home.headline: One draft. Threads, carousels, hooks, and CTAs.
home.subhead: Helia turns long-form content into structured social assets so you ship faster without losing your voice.
home.featureThreadsBody: Break ideas into tweet-sized beats that read as a single narrative.
home.featureCarouselsBody: Slide titles and bodies tuned for saves and shares on Instagram.
home.featureHooksBody: Openers that stop the scroll and a clear next step for readers.
home.footer: Helia — built with Next.js and Supabase.

auth.title: Sign in or sign up
auth.subtitle: Continue with email and password.
auth.errorAuth: Could not sign in. Try again or use email sign-in.
auth.signupSuccess: Your account was created. If email verification is required, check your inbox; then sign in.
auth.terms: By continuing you agree to the terms and privacy policy.

dashboard.title: Repurpose content
dashboard.subtitle: Turn one draft into social-ready formats.

repurpose.toolDescText: Paste your draft and generate threads, carousels, hooks, and CTAs—this is the repurposer.
repurpose.toolDescVideo: Pro only: upload audio or video and get a plain transcript. Not the repurposer—transcription only.
repurpose.placeholder: Paste a blog post, newsletter, or transcript…
repurpose.emptyHint: Click Repurpose to send your text to the API and see outputs.
repurpose.transcribeUpgrade: You've used all free video and audio transcriptions. Upgrade your plan to unlock more.
repurpose.transcribeDropTitle: Drag and drop a video or audio file
repurpose.transcribeDropHint: Choose file or drag and drop · MP3, WAV, MP4, M4A, AAC · source max ~120MB
repurpose.transcribeDropInvalid: That file type isn’t supported. Use MP3, WAV, MP4, M4A, or AAC.
repurpose.transcribeHint: MP3, WAV, MP4, M4A, AAC · over 4MB warning · extract audio in browser · server transcription via Supabase
repurpose.processingVideoHint: Long recordings may be split into parts. This can take a while.
repurpose.transcribeWarningOver4mb: This file is over 4 MB. For videos we only upload compressed audio; large audio files are compressed too.
repurpose.transcribeExtractFailed: Couldn’t extract or compress audio. Try a shorter clip or another format.
repurpose.transcribeSuccessBody: Your transcript is below. Copy it or switch to Text Repurpose and paste it there to generate formats.
repurpose.transcribeErrorTooLarge: Source file is too large (~120MB max) or a segment still exceeds the 25MB Whisper limit.
repurpose.transcribeErrorStorageNotConfigured: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is missing on the server; storage-based transcribe is disabled. See .env.example.
repurpose.transcribeErrorMissingAnon: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY is missing; resumable (TUS) upload cannot start.
repurpose.transcribeAsyncNoticeTitle: Transcription is running in the background
repurpose.transcribeJobRunningTitle: Transcription is running in the background…
repurpose.transcribeJobWorkerFailed: Transcription could not be finished. Try again in a moment or upload a different file.
repurpose.transcribeAsyncNoticeBody: You can close this page—the job keeps running on the server and the result is saved to your account. Refresh or wait a moment to see the transcript.
repurpose.transcribeHybridDropzoneTitle: Upload your video or audio file
repurpose.transcribeNeedFile: Select a valid audio or video file first.
repurpose.transcribeFileHint: Choose a file, then press Transcribe. MP3, WAV, MP4, M4A, AAC · up to ~25 MB.
repurpose.transcribeFileRegionAria: Transcription from uploaded video or audio
repurpose.transcribeErrorPayloadTooLarge: The upload is too large. Please choose a shorter video or clip.
repurpose.transcribeErrorTimeout: Processing took too long. Try a shorter audio or video clip.
repurpose.transcribeErrorRateLimit: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
repurpose.transcribeErrorAuth: Transcription couldn’t start. Check your API configuration.
repurpose.transcribeErrorServer: We couldn’t finish processing right now. Please try again in a moment.
repurpose.transcribeErrorUnexpectedResponse: We got an invalid response. Please try again.
repurpose.transcribeErrorGeneric: We couldn’t transcribe this file. Try another format or a smaller file.

supabaseTest.title: Supabase connection test
supabaseTest.envMissing: Missing URL or anon key — copy .env.example to .env.local
